other_observers: Mary Ellen Moore , Jeannie Mitchell; Not sure , Glen Walbeck had reported MEGU earlier but uncertain whether this was an adult .
specific_location: Cherry Creek State Park , North-east corner just south of the swim beach.
description: In comparison with adjacent Ring-billed Gulls , a little smaller in size , darker mantle , broad white secondaries , black primaries with white spots , fine dark streaking on back of white head with a darker patch around eye ( also dark ) and an unmarked yellow-green bill . Bird was swimming with a large group of Ring-billed's and looked smaller headed , shorter necked .Behaviors: Swimming with Ring-billed Gulls . Size and shape differences characteristic. did not observe in flight.Call: Not heardPlumage: adult non breeding
